title: Adversarial Thinking
description: Adversarial thinking models how rational and irrational attackers can exploit protocol and implementation edges. It is essential for reviewing Bitcoin changes before deployment.

resources.title: Bitcoin Dev Philosophy: Adversarial thinking
resources.notes: Mindset and framework for threat-driven review.

resources.title: Bitcoin Dev Philosophy: Threats
resources.notes: Concrete examples of modeling attack surfaces in Bitcoin.

resources.title: Mastering Bitcoin
resources.notes: Broad technical reference for the wallet, transaction, and protocol ideas that support this topic.
